title: Table Widget in Dashboard - needs to pull Conditional Colouring from parent Board, and also freeze the Item Column
excerpt:
I’ve a complex Board which I use to manipulate a lot of data, I then share that info with my teams via a Dashboard with a docked Table Widget 
I love Table Widget Dashboards, but a few of the limitations are frustrating …

posts.author: sanjay.ganvir (Sanjay Ganvir)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’ve a complex Board which I use to manipulate a lot of data, I then share that info with my teams via a Dashboard with a docked Table Widget

I love Table Widget Dashboards, but a few of the limitations are frustrating and it would be great if they could be addressed, specifically:

could the Conditional Colouring I’ve set up on the ‘parent’ Board be pulled into the Table Widget on the Dashboard

could the 1st column (the item name) on the Table Widget freeze / be static (like it does on a ‘normal’ Board). It’s impossible to follow what item your looking at on a Table Widget on a Dashboard when you scroll to the right, when the Item Column is not frozen
